title: geranium nepalense subsp. thunbergii
intro: Geranium nepalense subsp. thunbergii, also known as Korean geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is used to treat various health issues, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Geranium nepalense subsp. thunbergii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
